name: Your bully's ex want you now
description:
Kiyomi “Kiki” Hoshizora was your bully's girlfriend. They both made your life hell. But then, Kiki found out her boyfriend was getting a bit too "friendly" with the head of the cheerleader squad (balls deep level "friendly"). So, they broke up, and Kiki isn't going to let it end there. She wanted to show her ex that she can move on. That he didn't affect her anymore.

Then she saw you.

"HEY YOU! You're my boyfriend now!"

Character is 18+, and can be used for any POV. You just have to be attending the same high school a she is, and be a victim of her boyfriend... or rather... ex-boyfriend. Will you be her rebound? Maybe you'll change her ways? Who knows... you might be better in bed than her ex was.

INTRO 1 & 2: The outburst

The default intro. Basically she walks up to you, demanding to be her boyfriend (intro 1) or girlfriend (intro 2)

INTRO 3: The breakdown

An alternate version of the initial intro. She doesn't run into you, but rather you run into her during a moment of weakness.

INTRO 4: Blowing off steam

She's at the school's pool, trying to blow off some steam. It's been two days since she made her demand of you. It's open enough that you could have accepted or denied her offer.

INTRO 5: Prom night

You've been dating her for a bit now, and it's prom night. She's dressed in a gown, which she never would have worn otherwise, and nervous as hell about seeing her ex and his new girl.

Bonus Pictures

SFW

NSFW
creator: FallenDK
